title: activate_subscription_atomic: CASE expression correctly preserves max expiry across renewals
description: store.rs activate_subscription_atomic (~line 807): the UPSERT uses CASE to keep whichever expiry is greater (new vs existing). This means a subscriber who pays before their current subscription expires gets an additive extension rather than an overwrite. A contributor might 'simplify' this to always overwrite with the new expiry, which would incorrectly shorten an existing subscription. The CASE expression is load-bearing and should be defended.
